query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "anyflow: any-step video diffusion model with on-policy flow map distil" computer science
rationale: This paper qualifies under category (d) as a foundational survey and category (f) as a canonical reference for the domain of video diffusion models, providing the essential architectural context, temporal dynamics, and state-of-the-art baseline that any follow-up research on "AnyFlow" or similar on-policy flow map distillation methods would need to cite.
